values.Description:
A novel attempt to use LLMs to interact with VSCode using voice inputs. This project was built in 3 days in November 2024, before we had widespread Tool Calling support in models or MCP protocols. It also implements a custom XML parsing and processing strategy for structured output, before LLMs were widely able to output JSON reliably.

This project was showcased and recognized at the  [Rakuten Technology Conference 2024](https://corp.rakuten.co.in/rakuten-technology-conference-2024/)  conducted in Bangalore India.

Read more on how the project works on the [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/vachanmn123/v2c)
values.Title: Voice 2 Code
